name: Larry the Cable Guy
bio: Larry the Cable Guy is the stage persona of Daniel Lawrence Whitney, an American stand-up comedian who performs as an exaggerated Southern redneck character with the catchphrase Git-R-Done. A member of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour, he has released several comedy albums, two certified platinum, and voices Mater in Pixars Cars franchise. He developed the character after limited success performing under his own name.

timeline.ev: Joins the Blue Collar Comedy Tour
Album Lord, I Apologize released, later certified gold
Roasted in a Comedy Central special
History Channel series Only in America premieres

accolades: Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album (2006)
